message:
fix(vdbe): allow in-memory backend fallback in repro_delete_skip test

Add set_reject_mem_fallback(false) to the repro_delete_skip test to
explicitly permit in-memory backend fallback, matching the test's
intent and aligning with the convention established in other VDBE
engine tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
